_comment: Metriques par cycle -- remplace METRICS.md. Ecrit par merlin-qa-lead apres chaque cycle.
commits: feat(cycle-27): menu foam animation + distant silhouette + HUD vivid colors + T072 audio context fix
notes: Cycle 27 MENU FINAL POLISH + HUD + AUDIO FIX. (1) Fog: already present from cycle 26 (FogExp2 0x1a2030, 0.012). (2) Foam Y-animation: 25 foam patches now animate with sinusoidal Y bob (amplitude 0.003, freq 1.5Hz, staggered phases via i*0.42) — living sea feel. FoamPatchResult interface introduced. (3) Distant cliff silhouette: BoxGeometry(60,20,2) at z=-90 y=5, color 0x1a1e28 — third depth layer behind cliff, attenuated by fog. (4) T070 HUD faction bars: verified fully implemented (buildFactionPanel+updateHUD+store.subscribe). Upgraded FACTION_COLORS to vivid palette (druides=#6abf69 anciens=#e8c84c korrigans=#b888e8 niamh=#8ab4f8 ankou=#e05c5c). (5) T072 AudioContext: pendingAmbientType variable added to SFXManager.ts. startAmbient() queues type when ctx suspended. resumeOnInteraction() retries startAmbient(pendingAmbientType) after ctx.resume() resolves. Menu ambient now plays on first click even if boot screen auto-dismissed. Bundle: 116.20->118.24KB app (+1.75%). TS: 0 errors. Build: 2.22s. Menu score: 8.5->9.0/10.
